title: urochloa distachyoides
intro: Urochloa distachyoides, also known as finger grass, is a tropical grass species that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Urochloa distachyoides include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, while also providing relief from pain and inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, Urochloa distachyoides is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to create topical creams and ointments.
